canonical_label: Jimbo, Miwa & Ueno (1981) Monodromy preserving deformation of linear ordinary differential equations with rational coefficients (Physica D series, parts I-III)
resolution_method: Crossref API direct DOI lookup + bibliographic search query.author=Jimbo+Miwa & query.bibliographic=monodromy+preserving+deformation

physica_d_series.title: Monodromy preserving deformation of linear ordinary differential equations with rational coefficients
physica_d_series.verification_evidence: Crossref returned matching title, authors {Jimbo, Miwa, Ueno}, Physica D 2(2):306-352, April 1981
physica_d_series.anomaly_flag: AUTHOR_COUNT_DRIFT: Part I has THREE authors {Jimbo, Miwa, Ueno}; the 069r1 cite shorthand 'Jimbo-Miwa 1981' is field-customary but technically omits Ueno. Treat as known field-shorthand; not a halt-condition.

physica_d_series.title: Monodromy perserving deformation of linear ordinary differential equations with rational coefficients. II
physica_d_series.title_typo_note: 'perserving' (sic) is the typo in the published Crossref record
physica_d_series.verification_evidence: Crossref-indexed; cited as forward reference in JM Part III (10.1016/0167-2789(81)90003-8) and in Forrester-Witte (10.1002/cpa.3021); confirms canonical Part II DOI

physica_d_series.title: Monodromy preserving deformation of linear ordinary differential equations with rational coefficients. III
physica_d_series.verification_evidence: Crossref returned matching title, authors {Jimbo, Miwa}, Physica D 4(1):26-46, October 1981

discrepancies_with_069r1_cite.actual_finding: Only THREE Physica D papers exist in the Jimbo-Miwa(-Ueno) 1981 series: Parts I, II, III. There are no Parts IV-V published in Physica D under this title.
discrepancies_with_069r1_cite.possible_source_of_drift: Likely conflation with the FOUR Proc. Japan Acad. 'Deformation of linear ordinary differential equations' notes (10.3792/pjaa.56.143/149/269/301 = parts I-IV, all 1980, where Part IV is Miwa solo) plus possibly 'Aspects of Holonomic Quantum Fields' (10.1007/3-540-09996-4_51, Sato-Miwa-Jimbo 1980). 069r1 cite 'I-V' is loose/non-canonical.
discrepancies_with_069r1_cite.recommendation: Synth at LANE-1 should canonicalize 069r1 substrate references to the 3 Physica D papers (1981 I-III); the Proc. Japan Acad. 1980 notes are short-form precursors and largely subsumed by the Physica D series.

discrepancies_with_069r1_cite.actual_finding: Part I has three authors {Jimbo, Miwa, Ueno}. Parts II and III have two authors {Jimbo, Miwa}.
discrepancies_with_069r1_cite.recommendation: Use 'Jimbo-Miwa-Ueno 1981 I' for Part I and 'Jimbo-Miwa 1981 II/III' for Parts II/III in formal citations going forward.

accessibility_tier_definition: Tier 3 = paywalled with no open-access preprint; institutional ILL or pay-per-view required
accessibility_evidence: All three Physica D papers are gated behind Elsevier paywall (linkinghub.elsevier.com / sciencedirect.com). 1981 publication predates arXiv (1991); no preprint repository hosts them. RIMS preprints 315, 316, 319 (Kyoto Univ., 1980) are referenced as precursors but are not commonly available digitally. Project Euclid Proc. Japan Acad. notes are TIER 1 OPEN but cover only the short-form precursors (1980), not the full 1981 Physica D papers.
estimated_acquisition_cost_usd_per_paper: ~35-50 (ScienceDirect pay-per-view); $0 via institutional ILL if Yokohama-area library has Elsevier subscription

primary_substrate_gap_target.rationale: Part II contains the explicit Painlevé II-VI tau-function constructions including P_III, which is the equation flagged at 058R phase_b_canonical_map L136-140 as the substrate gap. Parts I (general framework) and III (P_VI degenerations) are supporting but not strictly required if Part II + Forrester-Witte 2002 (10.1002/cpa.3021) are paired.
